title: Supporting Next-Gen Reasoning Models (2025/2026)
content: Define the architectural approach for handling the unique API requirements of reasoning-capable models (GPT-5, Claude 4.5, Gemini 3) while maintaining backward compatibility and ensuring stable filename generation.

rationale.anomaly: New models (GPT-5, Claude 4.5, Gemini 3) introduce incompatible parameters (max_completion_tokens, budget_tokens, thinkingLevel) and behaviors (temperature constraints) that break the current generic API call logic.
rationale.approach: Establish a robust mechanism to map model-specific capabilities to provider-specific API shapes.
